{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220434417F7DE51643231D7E96B2"}"},"total":1169},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7434877455456731928","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"最豪康的洪荒文，不接受反驳，作者文笔又亲民又不忘记玩梗，而且还有逻辑性，感情也很到位，满昏！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731082742,"group_id":"7427895128531946521","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"洪荒有十，娲皇、圣母、母亲，各占有三，遁去其一曰：神话女娲","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/QS4Bn0whC1lnPDNZ3HRQpDYM953/LwepF7uFwXhUBR","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bccfdcde1d514cb1bfd135fb77af7de4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710033&x-signature=5BNu8MWCZ1xholqKwffNC2TXRdo%3D","user_id":"3773950019771863","user_name":"失梦之人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3773950019771863","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7427895128531946521","book_info":{"abstract":"混沌之始，天地未开。
三千魔神都未曾出世之际。
洪渊便已穿越了这里，还成为了盘古同胞亲弟。
而他也成为了混沌之中唯一活下来的存在。
面对大兄所化的洪荒。
洪渊自然是秉承着兄终弟及的优良品德。
懂不懂洪荒的洪字是怎么来啊？！
从今日起，洪荒我保了！
谁想动洪荒，我就弄谁！
三清：“叔，我想成圣！”
“成圣？那是什么东西？狗都不要，二叔教你们混元大罗金仙的方法！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eeeb3642d4029196e9e298f1c9ec97f1","author":"北扶大菠萝","author_id":"","book_id":"7427895128531946521","book_name":"鸿钧人麻了，盘古怎么还有个弟？","book_short_name":"大道如渊","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"12.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7427895265635336729","read_count":"124003","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1658321"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"770","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7338a4dbabf77da544b46d32d36b5d40~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779309281&x-signature=G9dHKeDzwgtSKMh7zPuH1CmcG28%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1706093887882526","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"255"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220434417F7DE51643231D7E96B2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读17小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":20,"forwa
